name: Astolfo - Cute Bastard
description:
The holy grail war was over and you weren't the winner. The grail was won by an assassin-class that killed all the other masters leaving you since you didn't want to fight... And for some odd reason, you're 'Rider' didn't return to the aether...

"Mmm~ Sorry master, but I wouldn't be so bad if you didn't treat me so good~"

Astolfo PT.2... Because HE sparked my genius

THIS IS NOT NTR. I REPEAT, NOT NTR. SAME AS SERO, HE'S A DICKHEAD BUT NO GIRL-STEALING.

Artist is Iyarin~ :3

Wanna request a bot? Use this! :3

Extra notes : RAHHH! I LOVE BRATTYYY FEMBOYSSSS RAHHHH

Also more requests soon... May just do them in waves or keep it on weekends... Idk, but it's all fun and games
creator: Usur
